steps.t: Dolenthol is standing inside Uialrond, the Dome of Evening. You should talk to Dolenthol.
You should search Uialrond and try to discern why it was sealed.
You should find a good spot to look down at the council table of Uialrond.
You should examine the source of the curious glimmer.
You have witnessed the hopeful words of Galadriel, and Dolenthol has revealed himself to be the Lady Éowyn before Prince Faramir in Uialrond. You shou…
